items.title: Cisco's stock pops 17% on surging AI orders, as company says it's cutting almost 4,000 jobs
items.summary: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026.

items.title: Asia-Pacific stocks trade mixed as Trump lands in Beijing for high-stakes Xi meeting
items.summary: Asia markets traded mixed ahead of closely watched Trump-Xi summit on trade, tariffs and technology restrictions.

items.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
items.summary: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.

items.title: In photos: Trump lands in China ahead of high-stakes summit with Xi
items.summary: The high-stakes summit is expected to cover a wide range of contentious topics, including trade, technology, export controls, Taiwan, and the Iran war.

items.title: This low-profile stock in the semiconductor supply chain has doubled this year. Wall Street still loves it
items.summary: Across the board, Wall Street analysts are bullish on Qnity Electronics and have raised their price targets on the stock.

items.title: India Bans Sugar Exports Through September to Protect Supply
items.summary: India, the world’s second-largest sugar producer, has banned exports until the end of September, according to an official notice, as the government seeks to protect local supplies.

items.title: Nasdaq Futures Rise, Focus Turns to Trump-Xi Meet: Markets Wrap
items.summary: US equity-index futures advanced as traders bet the record-breaking rally driven by enthusiasm for the artificial intelligence trade has further room to run.

items.title: What's At Stake as Xi and Trump Meet in Beijing
items.summary: President Donald Trump is in Beijing for the first state visit to China by a US leader in nine years, as the world’s two largest economies look to stabilize ties against the backdrop of the Iran war. Bloomberg's Stephen Engle breaks down what is at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: ASX Names Former Euronext Paris Chief Anthony Attia as CEO
items.summary: ASX Ltd. named Euronext NV executive Anthony Attia as its new leader, concluding a global search after Helen Lofthouse said earlier this year she would depart Australia’s main exchange operator.

items.title: Oil Steadies Ahead of Trump-Xi Talks as Iran War Tensions Simmer
items.summary: Oil steadied ahead of a meeting between US President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping, set against the backdrop of the Iran war that shows no signs of a near-term resolution.
